title: Worked Example - Listing Buses and Seats

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we use a nested for loop in C to display seat numbers for 2 buses, where each bus has 3 seats. The outer loop tracks buses, and the inner loop lists seat numbers.

**When executed, the code will show:**

```default
Bus 1 - Seat 1
Bus 1 - Seat 2
Bus 1 - Seat 3
Bus 2 - Seat 1
Bus 2 - Seat 2
Bus 2 - Seat 3
```
